ChatMiiTalkEach: {{6:6 arg="0x7800"}}{{6:11 arg="0x00CD"}}Masant ski luper, rancha supeli karanosto.
ChatMiiTalkEach_V000: {{6:6 arg="0x7800"}}{{6:11 arg="0x00CD"}}Tarks, mas wakali malan, raminho de tolenanki.
ChatMiiTalkEach_V002: {{6:6 arg="0x7800"}}{{6:11 arg="0x00CD"}}Naroo, eu não kalam po zerry rantcha...
ChatMiiTalkEach_V003: {{6:6 arg="0x7800"}}{{6:11 arg="0x00CD"}}Mo satchi der, você quer me gonzer?
ChatMiiTalkEach_V004: {{6:6 arg="0x7800"}}{{6:11 arg="0x00CD"}}Salky tavin ge ronga, nanty falda spoo.
ChatMiiTalkEach_V005: {{6:6 arg="0x7800"}}{{6:11 arg="0x00CD"}}Pachaku bidago na zu, alugue vooper ler talta, certo?
ChatMiiTalkEach_V006: {{6:6 arg="0x7800"}}{{6:11 arg="0x00CD"}}Então, seu zanil barki pax, neraf palti wab.
ChatMiiTalkEach_V007: {{6:6 arg="0x7800"}}{{6:11 arg="0x00CD"}}Drosen mac booratax e ranti bols ultimamente...
ChatMiiTalkEach_V008: {{6:6 arg="0x7800"}}{{6:11 arg="0x00CD"}}Proon foort dalem sa finchi, qawi laksa, kalamate zoog.
ChatMiiTalkEach_V009: {{6:6 arg="0x7800"}}{{6:11 arg="0x00CD"}}Lostet nag, terampi coo la nina, zaranolino tachi crinoline.
